result: The household weekly income variables have been cleaned and harmonised across four waves (ages 14-17) according to the specified missing-value codes and banding requirements. The final dataset containing NSID, banded income (incwhh14, incwhh15, incwhh16, incwhh17) and continuous income (incwhhcnt14, incwhhcnt15) has been saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
